name: Zoom
description: Allows you to zoom while paused!

zoom-sensitivity.name: Zoom Rate
zoom-sensitivity.description: Determines how sensitive the zoom is. Higher values increase zoom speed.

auto-hide-menu.name: Hide Menu Automatically
auto-hide-menu.description: Hides the menu by itself when zooming in.

auto-show-menu.name: Show Menu Automatically
auto-show-menu.description: Displays the menu again when zooming out.

alt-disables-zoom.name: Alt Key Stops Zoom
alt-disables-zoom.description: Prevents zooming while the Alt key is pressed.

toggle-menu-keybind.name: Toggle Pause Screen
toggle-menu-keybind.description: Allows showing or hiding the pause screen while zoomed in.
